title: Fix Object Disappearing After Adding from ERD Popup
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want objects added via the ERD popup to persist in the dictionary and diagram without disappearing, so that my workflow is reliable.
description:
## Bug
From the dictionary page, viewing an object's ERD and clicking the "+" button to add a new object would show the object being added, but closing the ERD popup caused:
1. The newly added object to disappear from the data table.
2. A "Bulk refresh missing fields" prompt appeared.
3. After the refresh completed, a browser reload was required to see the object.

Additionally, objects added from the ERD diagram were not appearing in the select dropdown and remained grayed out with the "+" icon even after being added.

## Fix
Fixed the add-object flow from the ERD popup so that:
- Objects are automatically added to the object list upon adding.
- The diagram refreshes to show newly added objects without grayed-out state.
- No browser reload is required.
acceptance_criteria: Objects added via the ERD popup persist in the dictionary data table
Objects appear in the select dropdown after being added
Diagram refreshes and shows newly added objects without grayed-out state
No browser reload is required to see added objects
Bulk refresh missing fields prompt does not cause objects to disappear
ux_changes: Objects added from ERD popup now persist immediately in the dictionary view and diagram without requiring a browser reload.
middleware_changes: Fixed the add-object flow to properly update both the dictionary data table and the ERD diagram state after adding objects from the ERD popup.
implementation_notes: Two related issues were fixed: (1) objects disappearing from the data table after closing the ERD popup, and (2) objects remaining grayed out with the '+' icon in the diagram after being added. The diagram now properly refreshes after add operations.
comment_summary: Developer reproduced a related issue where added objects didn't appear in the select box. Both the disappearing object bug and the grayed-out diagram state were fixed on dev. The diagram now refreshes correctly after adding objects.
